name: Anthropic
description: The main product is an AI system focused on reliability, interpretability, and steerability, developed through extensive research and the application of safety techniques. It employs natural language processing, human feedback, and reinforcement learning to enhance user interactions while ensuring safety and functionality.

people.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company building reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. Our team conducts frontier research, develops and applies a variety of safety techniques, and deploys the resulting systems via a set of partnerships and products.

people.title: Head of Product Management, Research
people.description:
Bringing the magic of Claude models and Anthropic’s research to end users and developers. 

I lead the product team collaborating with Research and Frontier Prototyping to develop new versions of Claude and pull forward emerging model capabilities.

Joined as the first technical product manager in 2023.

people.title: Head of Global GTM Recruiting
people.description:
Leading global GTM talent strategy and execution, partnering closely with executive leadership to scale our Sales & Partnerships, Applied AI, Marketing, Communications and Brand functions during a period of significant growth. Building and developing high-performing recruiting teams while maintaining Anthropic's exceptional bar for talent.
 
Leading leaders. 

Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

people.title: AI Safeguards, Head of Policy, Enforcement and Intelligence
people.description: In the process of building and scaling Anthropic's Safeguards Policy and Enforcement Org.  Join us, we're hiring!

people.title: Deputy General Counsel
people.description:
First Deputy General Counsel hire, responsible for building and scaling Anthropic's legal function to support commercial operations, product development, and regulatory compliance.

•	Built legal teams across commercial legal, product legal, litigation, and regulatory/compliance functions
•	Served as employment and IP counsel during periods of company growth
•	Currently leading expansion of product counsel team (Frontier Legal) providing counsel for foundation model development, AI product R&D, data acquisition, safety research and testing, and research on AI's impact on society
•	Develop and advance legal strategy on AI policy issues, including copyright, privacy, and competition
•	Manage external engagement and partnerships with key stakeholders in the AI ecosystem
•	Recruit and lead high performing legal talent

people.title: Senior Manager, Machine Learning Infrastructure

Spearheaded adoption of best practices in MLOps, including CI/CD for model pipelines, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and secure model deployment

people.title: Head of AI Engineering

Scaled product from prototype to production across 20+ enterprise deployments
Worked with GTM, product, and customer success teams to tailor models to client-specific KPIs

external_description: We're an AI research company that builds reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. Our first product is Claude, an AI assistant for tasks at any scale. Our research interests span multiple areas including natural language, human feedback, scaling laws, reinforcement learning, code generation, and interpretability.
